name: @auto-typer/desktop
description: Electron desktop controller for the Auto Typer firmware
author: Auto Typer

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && vite build && npm run prepare:electron
scripts.pack: npm run build && node electron/run-electron-builder.cjs --dir --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.dist: npm run build && node electron/run-electron-builder.cjs --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && node electron/run-electron-builder.cjs --mac --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && node electron/run-electron-builder.cjs --win portable --config electron-builder.config.cjs
